topStories.description: Israel on Tuesday said that it has killed Gholamreza Soleimani, a senior officer in the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), who commands the Basij force. The IDF also claimed that Ali Larijani, secretary of Iran’s Supreme National Security Council, has been killed. Iran is yet to respond.

topStories.title: Are the US and Israel waging war on Iran’s cultural heritage?
topStories.description: Iran says at least 56 of its heritage sites damaged or destroyed in war.

dailyNews.title: ‘Many hotels, restaurants may soon shutdown in Mysuru if LPG supply is not restored immediately’
dailyNews.description: The situation has turned critical, as distributors have failed to supply the required LPG despite repeated appeals, says Hotel Owners’ Association president Narayana Gowda

dailyNews.title: US west coast prepares for 'dangerous' heatwave in early spring
dailyNews.description: Severe weather is plaguing the US from coast to coast, bringing a mix of extreme heat and bitter cold.

dailyNews.title: Macron prepares France for ‘an age of nuclear weapons’ as Iran war rages
dailyNews.description: The French president described his plans for expansion as forward deterrence. What's behind his move?

dailyNews.title: The US-Israel war on Iran is shaped by religion as much as strategy
dailyNews.description: The conflict has mutated into a zero-sum collision of competing messianic frameworks.

dailyNews.title: Iran blames US, Israel for Hormuz tensions as crisis risks energy supplies
dailyNews.description: Iran's Araghchi calls for global condemnation of ‘military aggression’ that disrupted transit through Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Himachal Pradesh withdraws ‘Cabinet rank’ status for political appointees, others
dailyNews.description: The Congress government, which has been facing a financial crunch, has been taking steps towards achieving fiscal prudence

dailyNews.title: Senior Assam Leader Threatens To Quit Congress Over Poll Nomination
dailyNews.description: Senior Congress leader and Lok Sabha MP Pradyut Bordoloi has warned the party leadership that he may resign from the Congress if Lahorighat MLA Asif Mohammad Nazar is renominated for the upcoming...

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court strikes down law giving maternity leave only to mothers adopting children under 3 months
dailyNews.description: The bench also held that an adoptive mother should be entitled to maternity leave of 12 weeks, irrespective of the age of the adopted child.

dailyNews.title: World Cup 2026: Iran 'Negotiating' With FIFA To Shift Its Matches To Mexico
dailyNews.description: The FIFA World Cup will be jointly hosted by the US, Mexico and Canada. The 48-nation tournament will be played from June 11 to July 19.

dailyNews.title: Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US
dailyNews.description: Amazon Prime subscribers will be charged $9.99 for one-hour delivery and $4.99 for three-hour delivery. If you don't have a Prime subscription, you'll pay $19.99 for one-hour delivery and $14.99 for three-hour delivery.

dailyNews.title: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
dailyNews.description: Energy prices are surging as the Iran war disrupts supply, raising risks for the US, China and Europe.

dailyNews.title: Mojtaba Khamenei's ‘god’s will' escape during US-Israel strike that killed his father: What does leaked audio reveal?
dailyNews.description: Leaked audio reportedly reveals that Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader, narrowly escaped a US-Israeli missile strike on February 28 by stepping outside moments before the attack, while his wife and son tragically died in the explosion.

dailyNews.title: Map shows glaring scope of auto theft increase in Walz's Minneapolis: 'Deterrence problem'
dailyNews.description: Minneapolis saw a sharp rise in auto thefts in January and February of 2026, which a former state trooper says is part of a broader problem of a lack of deterrence.

dailyNews.title: A basic monthly bill Americans can’t dodge is becoming a midterm flashpoint
dailyNews.description: Rising electricity bills become key midterm election issue as voters face monthly costs they can't avoid, giving both parties new campaign ammunition.

dailyNews.title: Scoop: House GOP campaign arm launches ‘MAGA Majority’ program to boost Trump-aligned candidates
dailyNews.description: NRCC launches MAGA Majority program to boost GOP candidates in key battleground districts as Republicans defend House majority in midterm elections.

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrant from Venezuela learns sentence for biting ICE agent, with injury seen in photo
dailyNews.description: Robert Antonio Bastardo Llovera, an illegal immigrant from Venezuela, was sentenced after pleading guilty to a charge of assault on a federal officer.

dailyNews.title: Chiefs trade for Patrick Mahomes' backup after uncharacteristic six-win season: reports
dailyNews.description: The Kansas City Chiefs reportedly acquired Justin Fields in a trade with the New York Jets on Monday. It will be his fourth team in four years.

dailyNews.title: Iranian Americans in Los Angeles react with mixed emotions as Iran conflict escalates
dailyNews.description: Iranian Americans in Los Angeles celebrated the news of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death, but their joy is also mixed with fear for loved ones still in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Oil, gas prices jump as Trump flirts with striking Iranian oil infrastructure
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump targets Iran's Kharg Island oil hub, which handles 90% of Iranian crude exports to China and India, raising fears of broader Persian Gulf supply disruptions.

dailyNews.title: DHS hits back at Illinois county clerk who told ICE to stay away from primary polling places
dailyNews.description: DHS rebukes Illinois clerk who called ICE agents "thugs" and warned them away from polling places during elections, sparking immigration enforcement debate.

topStories.title: Ex-Biden official faces backlash over thinly veiled warning to companies when Dems are back in charge
topStories.description: Sen. Kennedy said last week he was concerned about comments made by Susan Rice telling companies they would be held accountable for aligning themselves with Trump.

topStories.description: The first Trump administration defended cluster munitions as “legitimate,” but on Monday, Adm. Brad Cooper condemned them as “inherently indiscriminate.”

topStories.description: Richard Grenell once hoped to be President Trump’s secretary of state. Instead, Mr. Trump just replaced him as Kennedy Center president.

dailyNews.title: Cuba Ready to Accept Outside Investment, Top Official Says
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s words came amid a nationwide blackout and as a top Cuban official said his country would move to open the economy to foreign investors.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Seeks to Remove Cuba’s President From Power During Negotiations
dailyNews.description: The United States has told Cuba that for meaningful progress to be made in negotiations, President Miguel Díaz-Canel must step down, said people familiar with the talks.

dailyNews.title: Israel targets more Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's calls for help
dailyNews.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Senate GOP aims to begin marathon debate on SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The Senate is expected to begin a marathon debate on the SAVE America Act, an elections bill that President Trump has been pressing Republicans to pass.

dailyNews.title: Details on ruling blocking the Trump administration's vaccine policy changes for kids
dailyNews.description: A federal judge blocked the Trump administration from limiting the number of vaccines recommended for children. Medical societies challenged HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s order to drop six vaccines from the list of shots that children should have. CBS News medical contributor Dr. Celine Gounder explains what it means and what could happen next.

dailyNews.title: Some U.S. allies decline to help Trump with Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump on Monday pressured allies and China for military assistance in reopening the Strait of Hormuz. The European Union and Australia turned down Mr. Trump's request while China and Japan were noncommittal. Nancy Cordes reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump hosting big White House event around EPA's biofuels mandates decision
dailyNews.description: President Trump has invited farmers and biofuels producers to the White House for an event next week as the industry awaits the government's announcement on mandates for the fuel additives.

dailyNews.title: Iran war throws Trump's China trip in doubt, but Beijing doesn't seem to mind waiting
dailyNews.description: The timing of a highly anticipated summit between President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping is in doubt after Trump asked to delay it by “a month or so” so he can focus on the widening war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump said he spoke to a former president about bombing Iran. Four denials suggest otherwise.
dailyNews.description: It appears he did not speak to former President Joe Biden, George W. Bush, Bill Clinton or Barack Obama.

dailyNews.title: 'Not our war': U.S. allies balk at Trump's Strait of Hormuz demands
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has spent much of his time in office berating and threatening his NATO allies.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls on nations to help secure Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Trump calls on nations to help secure Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks he will have the 'honor' of 'taking Cuba'
dailyNews.description: The president recently launched a war in Iran after topping Venezuelan leader Nicolas Maduro by force.
